name: Undying
description: Where go the living, the dead soon follow.

abilities.name: Ceaseless Dirge
abilities.description: Only when the Dirge of the Dead God ceases will this soldier's march finally end.

abilities.name: Decay
abilities.description: Grants self bonus per affected enemy hero. Increases the steal.

abilities.name: Soul Rip
abilities.description: Undying rips health away from all nearby units and uses it to heal an ally, or damage an enemy. Casting on allied heroes temporarily grants them bonus based on Undying's current strength.

abilities.name: Tombstone
abilities.description: This unit does not feel the effects from magical spell damage sources. Zombies are spell immune and their attacks slow the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Flesh Golem
abilities.description: Undying transforms into a horrifying flesh golem that grants a percentage increase with flat bonus movement speed. The Flesh Golem imbues Undying's attacks with a movement speed slow and damage amplification on affected enemy units.
